text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
The training center. No matter what<n>time of day,
she's always here.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
She's here rain or shine, and even on<n>the days
training isn't scheduled.

text_block_list.name: Opera O and Doto
text_block_list.text: Hyaaah! Yaaaaah!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Ooooh, Overlord T.M. Opera O. As<n>gallant and
beautiful as ever. And...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
There's Meisho Doto chasing after<n>her with her
single-minded gaze.<n>Ahhh... Truly divine! ♪

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
I knew there was something about<n>those two!
Before she knows it,<n>Doto'll catch up and be
welcomed<n>with open arms. And then, at last...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: Ohhhh! I have to stop myself!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
This is Agnes Digital. She's your<n>average
Umamusume... or so she<n>says. The one thing is—

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Ah, if it isn't my trainer—my kindred<n>spirit! Look!
The Umas are as<n>wonderful as ever today!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Come. There's space for you next to<n>me in the
front row. Let us raise our<n>prayers to our divine
oshis.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
She loves Umamusume with her<n>entire heart and
believes I'm as<n>much of an "Uma simp" as she is.
choice_data_list: By the way, I have something to talk to you about.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Oh, okay. What is it? I don't suppose<n>you've
found a cute little newcomer<n>ready for her debut?
choice_data_list: As a matter of fact, I have.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: Oooh, that's my trainer! So, what's<n>her name?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: Heheheh, that's not a bad name!<n>Agnes Digi...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: Wait, whaaat?! You don't mean...
choice_data_list: It's time to make your Twinkle Series debut.
It's time to make your Twinkle Series debut.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Hooo! At last, I'm off to the land of<n>paradise
beyond the clouds—to the<n>Twinkle Series!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Which means I'll be allowed the<n>chance to behold,
with my very own<n>eyes, heavenly Umamusume
heretofore unreachable to me!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Mwahahee! I feel like I'm about to<n>melt into a
puddle of emotion! I've got<n>so many oshis in both
the dirt and turf<n>tours.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
You remember the promise we made<n>that day,
right?

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text: There's no way I could have<n>forgotten it...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: Huh? Sorry, I don't think I heard youright. You're telling me not to pick?That I should run both?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
To run wild? On any track I want?!<n>Even if I'll
never be as good as my<n>oshis, I'm at least good
enough to<n>make it through the series?
choice_data_list:
Yeah! You've got what it takes to be an
all-rounder!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: AND IIIIIIIIII WILL ALWAYS LOVE<n>UUUUMAS!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
All right, you've won me over! I'll be<n>an
all-rounder! I'll run turf and dirt<n>and admire all my
oshis up close!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
She'll run both turf and dirt<n>races—That's the
promise I made<n>when I signed on to be her trainer.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
I am an all-rounder! These tempered<n>legs of mine
will carry me beside<n>every Umamusume there is!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
From this point forward, I'll embark<n>on a journey
building karma so that I<n>may behold the presence
of the<n>highest order of Uma angels.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Oh, it's Digital. Hello...

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Do my ears deceive me, or did I just<n>hear you
announce a decision to<n>make your debut?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: Ohhh... Opera O and Doto... W-well...

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
These two are T.M. Opera O and<n>Meisho Doto.
They're a year above<n>Agnes Digital.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
T.M. Opera O is a self-absorbed racer<n>who talks
the talk and walks the<n>walk. She's already
winning graded<n>races and is a strong contender in
the<n>Classics.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Ha ha ha ha! I am the Overlord! And<n>this year's
Satsuki Sho is as good as<n>mine!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
On the other hand, Meisho Doto is a<n>bit clumsy.
Her results are nothing to<n>write home about, but
she's known<n>for having a hidden strength when
push comes to shove.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
Ngh... I'm still no match for Opera O,<n>but I'll do my
best...

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Digital, if it's true you are to make<n>your debut, I
would take the news<n>with great joy, however...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
N-no! It hasn't been decided at all.<n>That's just a
baseless rumor that<n>was put out on social media.
choice_data_list: But you just agreed with my decision.
But you just agreed with my decision.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Shhh! Hush! Don't say that! Our lips<n>are sealed,
okay?!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: Aha ha ha! So, that's the issue.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Digital is afraid of the Hawthorne<n>Effect. It's
when you become overly<n>aware of yourself
because you're<n>being observed by others.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
You're... Digital's roommate Agnes<n>Tachyon,
right?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
As part of my Umamusume research,<n>I observe
her day and night. This<n>tendency of hers was
immediately<n>obvious.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
She is afraid her existence will be a<n>burden to
other Umamusume.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Uh, um, I-I don't know if I would say<n>"I'm afraid." I
just feel it's kind of<n>impudent to make them
notice me.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
I'm perfectly content to watch<n>everyone from the
quiet comfort of a<n>priv account they can't see.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
So please, pay me no mind! I just<n>want you
excellent people to enjoy a<n>conversation amongst
yourselves.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Agnes Digital's creed is that she is<n>no more than
a fan, and there must<n>be a clear line between
herself and<n>the Umamusume she so worships.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
I think it's too passive an attitude,<n>considering
she'll be competing<n>against them moving forward.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
With that said... I'm gonna savor the<n>golden
opportunity to run in the<n>Twinkle Series with every
last fiber of<n>my being!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: All while not getting in the way. I'llsimp inconspicuously from the frontlines.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
C'mon, Trainer! Now that it's<n>decided, let's hurry
up and get<n>training!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
I wanna start with the course Opera O<n>and Doto
just finished running! Their<n>lovely scent still
lingers in the air...<n>Mmm, yes! Yessss!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Agnes Digital is afire with passion in<n>the face of
her coveted debut. She's<n>undoubtedly an odd
duck, but it's<n>impossible to dislike her. I vow to
watch over her as she builds her<n>future.
